title: Madhya Pradesh High Court pulls up lawyer for saying only clients of Senior Advocates get bail
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court recently cautioned an advocate after he alleged that the Court grants bail only to those accused who are represented by Senior Advocates. In an order passed on May 8, Justice Ramkumar Choubey said the Court was refraining from initiating contempt of court proceedings against the counsel since he tendered an unconditional apology for his submission.“Considering the aforesaid, when Shri Saini tendered his apology, this Court is not inclined to initiate contempt procee
